title: ReprobenchConfig
description: Configuration file for Reprobench — a reproducible benchmark runner powered by Nix flakes.

environment.description: Controls how benchmark tasks are executed.

manager.description: Execution environment. Use "nix" to run tasks inside the configured Nix dev shell.

flake.description: Nix flake path. Only used when manager is "nix". Defaults to ".".

shell.description: Nix dev shell name. Only used when manager is "nix". Defaults to "default".

tasks.description: Named benchmark tasks. Each task runs a command and saves its stdout as the result.

command.description: Shell command to execute. Must write benchmark JSON to stdout.

output.description: File path where the result JSON is saved.

baseline.description: Path to the baseline result file.

current.description: Path to the current result file.

input.description: Path to the result file to generate a report from.

output.description: Path to write the generated Markdown report.

guards.description: Guard conditions used by `reprobench guard` for CI regression detection.

benchmarks.description: Map of benchmark name to guard condition.

min.description: Minimum acceptable value. Fails if the benchmark value is below this.

max.description: Maximum acceptable value. Fails if the benchmark value is above this.

unit.description: Unit of the benchmark value. Must match the unit in the result file.
